MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT INTELLISCENTS, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is denied. Defendant failed to file a copy of proposed answer as required by CCP 473(b). Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
